assertions.title: Registration UI end-to-end with error display

steps.action: Navigate to /register and submit valid credentials
steps.expected: Redirect to / and localStorage has token/user
steps.observed: Redirected to http://localhost:5173/; localStorage token and user present

steps.action: Submit /register again with the same email
steps.expected: Error banner shows server error value "Email already in use"
steps.observed: Error banner text shown exactly as "Email already in use"

assertions.title: Login UI end-to-end with error display

steps.action: Navigate to /login and submit valid credentials
steps.observed: Redirected to http://localhost:5173/; localStorage token and user present

steps.action: Login successfully, corrupt token, then open /
steps.expected: 401 interceptor clears localStorage and redirects to /login
steps.observed: After token corruption, app redirected to /login and localStorage token/user were both cleared

evidence.consoleErrors: Request failed with status code 401 (expected during invalid-token interceptor path)
evidence.network: GET /api/orgs with corrupted bearer token -> 401; subsequent app route transitioned to /login with cleared localStorage

assertions.title: XSS payload in name field is safely rendered

steps.observed: Registration succeeded and redirected to / with no alert dialog

steps.expected: Payload remains literal text and does not execute JS
steps.observed: Stored user payload remained literal "<script>alert(1)</script>" and window.__alertCalls remained empty

frictions.description: agent-browser built-in `network requests` output returned "No requests captured" during these flows, so request/response evidence was gathered via in-page XHR instrumentation.
frictions.resolution: Injected temporary XMLHttpRequest logging in browser context and recorded observed endpoint status codes for each assertion.

summary: Tested 4 assertions (VAL-AUTH-004, VAL-AUTH-007, VAL-AUTH-009, VAL-AUTH-012): 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
